title: Coi Target List Vancouver
content:
# COI Target List — Vancouver (Initial Research)

Purpose: seed a real local referral network for recruiting + production conversations.

## Priority A (Start this week)

### Mortgage
1. The Mortgage Group (Vancouver presence)
   - Source: https://wowa.ca/mortgage-broker-vancouver
   - Next step: identify 1 broker on LinkedIn, send intro DM

2. Clear Trust Mortgages
   - Source: https://wowa.ca/mortgage-broker-bc
   - Next step: find team lead / partnership contact

### Title / Closing Ecosystem
3. FCT (First Canadian Title)
   - Source: https://fct.ca/
   - Next step: locate BC rep for agent education events

4. Stewart Title Canada
   - Source: https://www.stewart.ca/
   - Next step: ask about local rep who works with Realtors

### Home Inspection
5. Inspect.ca
   - Source: https://inspect.ca/
   - Next step: request intro call about shared client education

6. Vancouver Home Inspections
   - Source: https://vancouverhomeinspections.ca/
   - Next step: identify owner/lead inspector for coffee chat

### Real Estate Law
7. BC Real Estate Lawyers
   - Source: https://bcrealestatelawyers.com/
   - Next step: ask about co-hosting buyer/seller Q&A

8. Northam Law Corporation
   - Source: https://northam-law.com/real-estate-conveyancing/
   - Next step: outreach to conveyancing lead

## Outreach Message Template (COI)
"Hey [Name] — I’m building deeper relationships with professionals who serve agents/homebuyers in Vancouver. I’d love to trade notes on what clients are struggling with in 2026 and explore ways to collaborate. Open to a quick coffee next week?"

## This Week Minimum Target
- 3 outbound COI intros sent
- 1 coffee chat booked
